# UiHost.DialectKind enumeration

Whether a registry entry is a JSON-RPC `request` or a `notification` (spec §26.6).

```csharp
public enum DialectKind
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Request | `0` | A request that expects a response. |
| Notification | `1` | A notification — no response is sent. |
